agent_roster.focus: Mustard X, gaps, options agreement, panel expectancy, and whether a hypothesized edge is actually money-relevant.
agent_roster.label: Quant Edge Agent

agent_roster.focus: Orders, fills, giveback, sizing, stops, stale fires, permission leaks, and anything that can turn good theory into bad P/L.
agent_roster.label: Execution Risk Agent

agent_roster.focus: Panel to pick to decision to order to fill to exit to realized result to panel score integrity.
agent_roster.label: Contract Spine Agent

agent_roster.focus: Whether gap maps, parent shelves, channels, options walls, and price highways agree or conflict.
agent_roster.label: Auction + Options Agent

review_questions: What is the single most money-relevant thing to fix or watch before the next session?
Which current hypothesis deserves more samples, and which deserves deletion/tightening?
Did any route/panel/permission/gate evidence contradict the making-money goal?
Are Mustard X and gap/options agreement accumulating usable evidence or just pretty context?
Did giveback protection save money or strangle valid opportunity?
What must not be changed yet because evidence is still too thin?

forbidden: remove or add a gate directly
blend experiment evidence into normal score partitions
safety_rules.promotion_path: LLM recommendation -> experiment admission -> shadow/paper evidence -> daily certification -> promotion gate -> human approval.

blocked_reasons: daily certification is REJECTED; AI output is research only
ai_learning.operator_read: AI learning produced 13 research hypotheses; none can affect the bot without admission and certified forward evidence.

top_queue.kill_criteria: Retire if runner opportunity lost exceeds protected drawdown after 30 closed trades.
top_queue.next_action: Convert this into an admitted shadow panel/spec before scoring it.
top_queue.title: Morning profit decay guard

top_queue.kill_criteria: Retire or tighten if 20 shadow picks produce avg ghost R <= 0, or if top-channel collisions outperform lower-location picks.
top_queue.next_action: Convert this into an admitted shadow panel/spec before scoring it.
top_queue.title: Bottom-channel gap-highway long

top_queue.kill_criteria: Reopen only if exhausted parents show better forward expectancy than fresh parents over at least 30 samples.
top_queue.next_action: Convert this into an admitted shadow panel/spec before scoring it.
top_queue.title: Mustard X exhausted parent avoid

top_queue.kill_criteria: Do not promote if the first 30 forward shadow candidates fail to keep high capture and positive realized/ghost expectancy.
top_queue.next_action: Convert this into an admitted shadow panel/spec before scoring it.
top_queue.title: Mustard X fresh deep-stack grind

top_queue.kill_criteria: Do not promote if the first 20 forward shadow candidates fail to prove realized runner R after partials/trailing, regardless of max favorable R.
top_queue.next_action: Convert this into an admitted shadow panel/spec before scoring it.
top_queue.title: Mustard X fresh lone-parent runner

top_queue.kill_criteria: Retire if options agreement fails to improve avg R over gap-only picks after 30 clean shadow samples.
top_queue.next_action: Convert this into an admitted shadow panel/spec before scoring it.
top_queue.title: Options and gaps clear-highway agreement

daily_certification.operator_read: Daily spine rejected: critical registry/score/order contract breaches are present.

recommendations.rationale: Route permission block protected against net-losing candidates on this route.
